시편 82:1.content: God presides in the great assembly. He judges among the gods.

시편 82:2.content: “How long will you judge unjustly, and show partiality to the wicked?”

시편 82:3.content: “Defend the weak, the poor, and the fatherless. Maintain the rights of the poor and oppressed.

시편 82:4.content: Rescue the weak and needy. Deliver them out of the hand of the wicked.”

시편 82:5.content: They don’t know, neither do they understand. They walk back and forth in darkness. All the foundations of the earth are shaken.

시편 82:6.content: I said, “You are gods, all of you are sons of the Most High.

시편 82:7.content: Nevertheless you shall die like men, and fall like one of the rulers.”

시편 82:8.content: Arise, God, judge the earth, for you inherit all of the nations.
